PROFILE PAGE [id] ISSUES:

Line 49: const favoriteBooks = books.slice\(0, 4\);
- Shows books 1, 2, 3, 4 for ANY profile \(hardcoded\)
- Should be based on what books the user has actually rated
- Currently shows same books for every profile regardless of user ID

Line 50: const recentRatedBooks = books.slice\(2, 6\);
- Shows books 3, 4, 5, 6 for ANY profile \(hardcoded\)
- Should be sorted by date for that specific user
- Currently shows same books for every profile regardless of user ID

Line 37: const ratedBooks = books;
- Comment says "Mock: All books rated by user"
- But shows ALL BOOKS \(1-8\) regardless of which user's profile it is
- Should only show books that user has actually rated
- Each user should have different rated books, but currently ALL users see ALL books
EOF
cat /tmp/profile_issues.txt)
